name: Team Yang
subject: Most voters are undecided because they haven’t met Andrew yet. You can help change that.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
We’re going up with our first TV ad if we can reach our goal. Pitch in to make it happen.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=2118%2E377263%2E5ueTfy) Yang Gang --

Did you see our latest announcement? We have set a BIG goal of $1.5 million by the end of October. Reaching this goal will mean that we can place much needed ad buys to share our message with voters.

**_But that means we only have 8 days to reach this goal!_ [Can you pitch in?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/14964?t=5&akid=2118%2E377263%2E5ueTfy)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/14964?t=13&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=2118%2E377263%2E5ueTfy)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/14964?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=2118%2E377263%2E5ueTfy)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/14964?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=2118%2E377263%2E5ueTfy)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/14964?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=2118%2E377263%2E5ueTfy)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/14964?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=2118%2E377263%2E5ueTfy)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/14964?t=8&amount=25&akid=2118%2E377263%2E5ueTfy)
---
Reaching our goal means we can make an ad buy in the early primary states so we’re front and center in the mind of every voter when the primaries start.

And many people are still undecided about which candidate they are supporting. We need to introduce them to Andrew and his Humanity First plan for America.

**[Can you contribute to this critical goal so we can increase our visibility in the early primary states?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/14964?t=7&akid=2118%2E377263%2E5ueTfy)**
[Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/14964?t=6&akid=2118%2E377263%2E5ueTfy)
---
Thank you,

Team Yang
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/14964?t=14&akid=2118%2E377263%2E5ueTfy)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=2118%2E377263%2E5ueTfy) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=2118%2E377263%2E5ueTfy) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

All Rights Reserved
New York, NY

name: Cory Booker
subject: So what do you say, friend, dinner?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, I know I haven't reached out about this lately. But I have good news: there's still time to enter our contest for a chance to join me for a team dinner. [**Chip in whatever you can right now and you 'll be automatically entered for a chance to win.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-dinnerwcab?refcode=em_fr_20191023_CB_20191023-fr-CB-dinnercontest8-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") I'm eager to meet you and talk about politics, our favorite movies, Star Trek, or just life in general. It'll be a great time to get to know a few of my top supporters over a meal. (And I promise, it doesn't have to be vegan!) We're coming up on the final week to enter before we choose four lucky winners. One of them could be you. [**Want to join me for an evening of good food and great conversation? Donate now to be automatically entered for your chance to win.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-dinnerwcab?refcode=em_fr_20191023_CB_20191023-fr-CB-dinnercontest8-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Looking forward to this,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-dinnerwcab?refcode=em_fr_20191023_CB_20191023-fr-CB-dinnercontest8-actives_actives_button&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") _P.S. If you 've already entered the contest, you can actually donate again to be automatically entered a second time to increase your chances of winning. [**Enter the contest here.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-dinnerwcab?refcode=em_fr_20191023_CB_20191023-fr-CB-dinnercontest8-actives_actives_l3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")_ _No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to enter or win and will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by November 3, 2019. Enter by contributing[here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a0b/5fca0d19/76dbb75f/291c2497/427105347/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-dinnerwcab") or click [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a0b/5fca0d19/76dbb75f/291c2496/427105347/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/Dinner-with-Cory") to enter without contributing. Four (4) winners will receive the following prize package: round-trip tickets for winner from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to a destination in Sponsor's sole discretion; one-night hotel accommodations for winner; opportunity to have dinner with Senator Cory Booker (approx. retail value $3,000). Odds depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of 50 United States, District of Columbia and Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). View full official rules at [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a0b/5fca0d19/76dbb75f/291c2495/427105347/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/dinner-with-cory-contest/"). Sponsor: Cory 2020, PO Box 32009, Newark, NJ 07102._
---

Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a0b/5fca0d19/76dbb75f/291c2493/427105347/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a0b/5fca0d19/76dbb75f/291c2492/427105347/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a0b/5fca0d19/76dbb75f/291c2491/427105347/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a0b/5fca0d19/76dbb75f/291c2490/427105347/VEsHBw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a0b/5fca0d19/76dbb75f/291c2494/427105347/VEsHBg/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Steve Chabot
subject: When You’re The Front-Runner, You’re the Target
body:
Radical Policies and Ultra-Leftist Thinking? No Images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jdihlkty-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdihlkty-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdihlkty-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [When You're The Front-Runner, You're the Target](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdihlkty-kujkulhluu-j/)
About two months ago I made a prediction that Elizabeth Warren was the person most likely to be the Democratic nominee for president. Was my prediction correct? This week I discuss why criticisms of Warren's radical policies and ultra-leftist thinking are evidence that this prediction may very well be true. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdihlkty-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdihlkty-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [A Reason to Celebrate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdihlkty-kujkulhluu-d/)
I recently spoke to a gathering of pro-life constituents on our shared commitment to protect innocent unborn lives. Calling it a "Thanksgiving Vigil," we were gathered to reflect and celebrate advancement in our pro-life mission. In this week's blog, I discuss the reason why we were celebrating and how this news is another accomplishment in our battle to protect those who are the most vulnerable. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdihlkty-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdihlkty-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Impeachment and the Economy](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdihlkty-kujkulhluu-u/)
Back in 1992, Bill Clinton's campaign manager, James Carville, successfully used the slogan "it's the economy, stupid" to defeat George H.W. Bush for the presidency. So how is the economy looking this election cycle, and what impact will that have on President Trump's bid for winning a second term? [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdihlkty-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdihlkty-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Will Impeachment Sink a Critical Trade Deal?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdihlkty-kujkulhluu-n/)
The Democrats are creating a political firestorm with their false impeachment inquiry against President Trump. Meanwhile, important issues are being ignored. In this week's blog, I discuss these issues that have more effect on our lives than this latest attempt to remove the President from office. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdihlkty-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdihlkty-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdihlkty-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdihlkty-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdihlkty-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdihlkty-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdihlkty-kujkulhluu-f/)
---|---|---

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: This is Bull Schiff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Patriot,
Yesterday, I led a group of my colleagues into the room where Adam Schiff was conducting a secret hearing and demanded that we be present. Schiff got up and left the room like a coward - like always.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eOFbnVpqH4-yopQhAjW51gECQTKdNxz6Q_hxno2x5nfO6iLzVNV27AX2Xw4aL8eGnZK8tA7_AuifWnVyZg2U5fxEoBiAeH3pM4uA6Vshl0NrtsphyB_BSeSgmLqO4RNbfTiqlVEnhFDr24Zf6Dqe1xgGxDey-h3Gr5-5Rxc8h_Q=&c=rzhuA1GptWe8tcdQQ9pzR_jVzacn7Beb5SAW6PqwQM3VIRjHFN7rKQ==&ch=wjzfeDJG6_cyhergefg7MjsiFfJ8pqKwc1-KtvvpyndlN2DIIzq7bA==)
---
| [Read More](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eOFbnVpqH4-yopQhAjW51gECQTKdNxz6Q_hxno2x5nfO6iLzVNV27AX2Xw4aL8eG1LzLvOly4fpwWglBju2T4XeGJ6ZQnEF4LWK2MebCGGIkExvLXLw_8SJ0wT2903MYd5SjmigMjvUofKWa07q1YlSG8J_S3Y_GuqMwB0dAOjQnulUJgJ5dVhllgeub6qfXbuppJ5a5lrZRawmGjEdUyA==&c=rzhuA1GptWe8tcdQQ9pzR_jVzacn7Beb5SAW6PqwQM3VIRjHFN7rKQ==&ch=wjzfeDJG6_cyhergefg7MjsiFfJ8pqKwc1-KtvvpyndlN2DIIzq7bA==)
---
| Adam Schiff has been holding secret impeachment hearings behind closed doors, and I've had enough of it.
We've had enough of his bull schiff, so I led 30 Republican Representatives into his closed-door hearing today to demand that we be a part of the process. I will not let him overturn the results of the 2016 election without full transparency for the American people, and the voters who elected Donald Trump to office. Now I need you to join the fight.
---
| | | [DONATE NOW](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eOFbnVpqH4-yopQhAjW51gECQTKdNxz6Q_hxno2x5nfO6iLzVNV27AX2Xw4aL8eGnZK8tA7_AuifWnVyZg2U5fxEoBiAeH3pM4uA6Vshl0NrtsphyB_BSeSgmLqO4RNbfTiqlVEnhFDr24Zf6Dqe1xgGxDey-h3Gr5-5Rxc8h_Q=&c=rzhuA1GptWe8tcdQQ9pzR_jVzacn7Beb5SAW6PqwQM3VIRjHFN7rKQ==&ch=wjzfeDJG6_cyhergefg7MjsiFfJ8pqKwc1-KtvvpyndlN2DIIzq7bA==)
---
| Democrats keep saying that we have a Constitutional crisis. As it turns out, they are the ones that created it. They are trying to overturn the will of the American people, and they're doing it in secret because they are afraid of the truth.
Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi will stop at nothing to remove President Trump from office, and they'll succeed unless we band together and fight this sham of an impeachment process. [Will you join the fight to defend President Trump?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eOFbnVpqH4-yopQhAjW51gECQTKdNxz6Q_hxno2x5nfO6iLzVNV27AX2Xw4aL8eGnZK8tA7_AuifWnVyZg2U5fxEoBiAeH3pM4uA6Vshl0NrtsphyB_BSeSgmLqO4RNbfTiqlVEnhFDr24Zf6Dqe1xgGxDey-h3Gr5-5Rxc8h_Q=&c=rzhuA1GptWe8tcdQQ9pzR_jVzacn7Beb5SAW6PqwQM3VIRjHFN7rKQ==&ch=wjzfeDJG6_cyhergefg7MjsiFfJ8pqKwc1-KtvvpyndlN2DIIzq7bA==)
---
| | | [<<RAPID DONATE>>](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eOFbnVpqH4-yopQhAjW51gECQTKdNxz6Q_hxno2x5nfO6iLzVNV27AX2Xw4aL8eGnZK8tA7_AuifWnVyZg2U5fxEoBiAeH3pM4uA6Vshl0NrtsphyB_BSeSgmLqO4RNbfTiqlVEnhFDr24Zf6Dqe1xgGxDey-h3Gr5-5Rxc8h_Q=&c=rzhuA1GptWe8tcdQQ9pzR_jVzacn7Beb5SAW6PqwQM3VIRjHFN7rKQ==&ch=wjzfeDJG6_cyhergefg7MjsiFfJ8pqKwc1-KtvvpyndlN2DIIzq7bA==)

clean_body: | | | | | | | Patriot, Yesterday, I led a group of my colleagues into the room where Adam Schiff was conducting a secret hearing and demanded that we be present. Schiff got up and left the room like a coward - like always. | == | == | Adam Schiff has been holding secret impeachment hearings behind closed doors, and I've had enough of it. We've had enough of his bull schiff, so I led 30 Republican Representatives into his closed-door hearing today to demand that we be a part of the process. I will not let him overturn the results of the 2016 election without full transparency for the American people, and the voters who elected Donald Trump to office. Now I need you to join the fight. | | | == | Democrats keep saying that we have a Constitutional crisis. As it turns out, they are the ones that created it. They are trying to overturn the will of the American people, and they're doing it in secret because they are afraid of the truth. Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi will stop at nothing to remove President Trump from office, and they'll succeed unless we band together and fight this sham of an impeachment process. == | | | == | Democracy dies in darkness. God Bless America, | | Matt Gaetz | == == | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ | Copyright (C) 2019 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. name: Cory Gardner
subject: Democrats are now the party of extremists
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY GARDNER FOR SENATE
body:
Every day is an opportunity for their movement to expand upon what we believed was the tipping point of their radicalism, which is why I'll never stop fighting for common sense, economically empowering, conservative policies that we all need and want.
f you would like to unsubscribe, please visit [here](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6461032/136068195/2036/1/?90482085=aHR0cDovL2N0NC5kbXNncy5uZXQvdT9pZD0xMzYwNjgxOTUuMTU3NDk2ZTNhYjU2NmU1NGRmOGE4YTlkYTIyYjY0OTImbj1UJmw9YS1ncyZvPTY0NjEwMzI%3d&x=a9f9c70e).

Friend, without a doubt, the Democratic party is the party of extremists. As I write this, Democrats are failing to address the needs of their constituents and instead are focusing on their version of reality:
* The Green New Deal
* Massive government expansion
* Medicare-for-all
* Open borders

While these causes may seem noble to the Democrats, the American people and Coloradans wholeheartedly disagree. That's why I am looking for your input on what's happening in the Democratic party. Do you have a second to complete our latest quick poll?

**_What do you think of the Democrats' extreme agenda?_****__ __**

**_ _** **[**RESPOND HERE**](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6461032/136068195/109375/2/)**
---

Every day is an opportunity for their movement to expand upon what we believed was the tipping point of their radicalism, **which is why I'll never stop fighting for common sense, economically empowering, conservative policies that we all need and want. **

By sharing your input with me today, you're helping me in that very same fight. So, remember to submit your response as soon as possible in order to give my team an accurate sampling of results:

**[**RESPOND HERE**](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6461032/136068195/109375/3/)**
---

Thanks in advance for sharing your response with me and the rest of Team Gardner.

Cory

_** **_ **[**RESPOND HERE**](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6461032/136068195/109375/4/)**
---
PAID FOR BY CORY GARDNER FOR SENATE
---

PO Box 1003, Alexandria, VA 22313

name: Stephen Stepanek
subject: ICYMI: Volinsky Running for Governor
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjczODQ2NDMzOTMzNDMyNzg2JmM9czVtOSZlPTE5MjgmYj0yODcyMzc4MTQmZD10NG80ZjV5.jpJdpgd9wmqMINWBjg1udOAAPzU86t0Rz9Eb8cDBaIw)
| | |
---
| [VOLINSKY'S RUNNING](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjczODQ2NDMzOTMzNDMyNzg2JmM9czVtOSZlPTE5MjgmYj0yODcyMzc4MTYmZD16MW4ybDNi.sTKj6mTJhEc-TyU_AQSnvZfvyF9SXBXdJpqfDt-LVOY)
---
---
| |
---
| Derek, Radical, out-of-touch Executive Councilor Andru Volinsky made it official: **He's running for Governor. **
---
---
| | | [](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjczODQ2NDMzOTMzNDMyNzg2JmM9czVtOSZlPTE5MjgmYj0yODcyMzc4MTgmZD1kMnA0djl4.7n6QSLMpVWm1XKfzpsL16KVyTHgEIm4iNWO6vSMqJjE)
---
| |
---
| All those terrible bills Governor Sununu had to veto? **Volinsky would have signed them. ** **_Every. Single. One. _** Democrats like Andru Volinsky will do whatever they want to implement an income, sales, or any other kind of broad-based tax in the State of New Hampshire. We have to defeat their out-of-touch agenda next November if we're going to protect the New Hampshire Advantage next year. [
](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjczODQ2NDMzOTMzNDMyNzg2JmM9czVtOSZlPTE5MjgmYj0yODcyMzc4MjAmZD1xMnY0ajd0.gOzFN7efq006i27A24KCOQMlhcwm1vqiIGy0lIHmYXk) [Can you donate $25 to help us defeat the Volinsky Agenda? ](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjczODQ2NDMzOTMzNDMyNzg2JmM9czVtOSZlPTE5MjgmYj0yODcyMzc4MjImZD1jNmgyczR1.PcmhaznFbYPYDAqBZ_EztBBFlyc3dciQ-Dx_oNt5iQU) It doesn't matter if the Democrats nominate Volinsky, Dan Feltes, or any other Democrat - they're agenda to implement new taxes will be the same. [Will you help us stop them?](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjczODQ2NDMzOTMzNDMyNzg2JmM9czVtOSZlPTE5MjgmYj0yODcyMzc4MjQmZD13NXMzbThr.C1kpWXHv6ObP9cl1XouflVkveM1eYL4IN17Hhwf55Fc) We are doing a lot at the New Hampshire GOP to hold Democrats accountable, elect Republicans across New Hampshire, and protect the New Hampshire Advantage. [Donate today to support our party's efforts.](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjczODQ2NDMzOTMzNDMyNzg2JmM9czVtOSZlPTE5MjgmYj0yODcyMzc4MjYmZD1xMmcyYzhn.lfLOGBqydlpuwHHVYO-DXxRcGRHg_zDVpUyvj0tw9q8) Sincerely, Stephen Stepanek
NHGOP Chairman P.S. Help us get out the word by [sharing our latest digital video hitting Andru Volinsky.](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjczODQ2NDMzOTMzNDMyNzg2JmM9czVtOSZlPTE5MjgmYj0yODcyMzc4MjgmZD15Mmg4YjRi.37MP0X9LRMjxfCWJhuTF0L9MkQjOl1phpkrT7cSnuyg)

name: Mike Franken
subject: I know what winning looks like
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
I know we've built a campaign to win - and now its being noticed. That's because of you. Can you chip in now to keep up the momentum?
|
---

| | Friends, a moment of your time, please: I spent over 36 years in the Navy laying the groundwork to succeed in complicated situations. This campaign is no different. Every successful mission starts with a thoughtful strategy and a plan to execute. We started this campaign with a commitment to speak the truth and to meet voters in every part of Iowa. **That 's what we've done -- and it's working.** | [Donate Now](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f247f/33365068/4a65c46f/3f8bbb4a/3523129152/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-october?refcode=20191024_em_fr_button")
---
When the news broke about Donald Trump's self-serving behavior in Ukraine, I spoke as the first candidate to call for an impeachment inquiry to proceed. **That decision wasn 't about politics -- it was about what's right.**
Joni Ernst still has not spoken out in support of the inquiry. Her decision is about political affiliation versus what the military should have taught her about doing what's right. Now, we can see it's hurting her.
**Just this week, CNN said Iowa is one of the states that could help Democrats flip the Senate.**
That's because we stuck to our principles and called out Joni on her weakness. It is encouraging that people are noticing our race in Iowa, but we can't ease off now.
**[Would you please contribute to my unrelenting effort to hold Joni Ernst accountable? I intend to do my part to flip the Senate?](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f247f/33365068/4a65c46f/3f8bbb4b/3523129152/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-october?refcode=20191024_em_fr")**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $5 Now](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f247f/33365068/4a65c46f/3f8bbb44/3523129152/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-october?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20191024_em_fr_express_lane_5")
---

---
[Donate $25 Now](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f247f/33365068/4a65c46f/3f8bbb46/3523129152/VEsD/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-october?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=20191024_em_fr_express_lane_25")

[Other Amount](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f247f/33365068/4a65c46f/3f8bbb47/3523129152/VEsA/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-october?refcode=20191024_em_fr_express_lane_othe")

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: URGENT: A call to protect life
body:
Hi Peter,
I hope this email finds you well and alerts you to something you may have missed in the news. Planned Parenthood recently announced their largest investment ever in the 2020 election cycle - an astounding $45 million to back pro-abortion candidates.
Should we be surprised? Planned Parenthood isn’t focused on women’s health (something we’ve all known for quite a while). Their number one goal is profit, and they’re taking the lives of babies to make it happen.
They know the only way to secure their future is to defeat President Trump and gain a pro-abortion majority in Congress.
Peter, this should make you, and every Christian in America, stand up and take notice. Let’s not forget exactly who Planned Parenthood is and what this group is doing according to the investigative work done by Live Action.
* Lying about abortion-related complications to vulnerable women
* Securing secret abortions for underage sex slaves
* Participating in covering up child sexual abuse and concealing the identity of abusers
* Supporting sex-selective abortions
* Accepting abortion money from racist donors to abort black babies

They are laser-focused on one thing - to generate abortion sales. Every 90-seconds a baby is aborted at a Planned Parenthood facility. Let that sink in for a moment.
Is this what you want your tax dollars funding? Is this the nation you want? I know it’s not.
But millions of Christians sit on the sidelines, sipping their sweet ice tea, unaware of the power of their vote -- we have to awaken them to take action.
Planned Parenthood will spend millions of dollars in Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Michigan, Minnesota, New Hampshire, North Carolina, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin to make sure President Trump does not return to the Oval Office.
It’s disappointing that votes to fund Planned Parenthood have fallen along partisan lines, but as it stands, Planned Parenthood knows they need to pick up only four seats in the Senate to gain a pro-abortion majority.
Peter, I’m writing this note to ask you to [help take on the agenda of Planned Parenthood by donating](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p191024apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191024apl01nd&n=1) any amount to help fund our 2020 campaign to get Christians to vote. Even if it’s just $5, you will make a difference, and your money will be put to good use.
When you donate to My Faith Votes, you make our strategy possible to target these swing states and motivate Christians to vote for life.
We are utilizing all the latest technology to locate Christian voters, reach them through media, door-to-door efforts, peer-to-peer texting, and church outreach efforts.
Planned Parenthood is working overtime to secure the future of its evil cash-making corporation at the expense of children’s lives.
But I believe the full power of the Christian influence has yet to be fully unleashed. You can make this possible by donating today.
When you donate, you’re linking arms with thousands of other Christians who’ve stepped up to do the same, and together through our efforts and our prayers, we can take on the evil of Planned Parenthood.
I hope you won’t delay. The 2020 efforts are underway now. Will you consider making a gift towards this urgent need to protect life in 2020 and for the future of our nation?
Thank you, my friend. I appreciate you!
[](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p191024apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191024apl01nd&n=2)
**United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191024apl01nd&n=3)
©2019 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191024apl01nd&n=4).

name: Cory Booker
subject: I need you with me, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Our monthly fundraising deadline next week is a very big deal, friend. Here's why: **Voters will start weighing in come February, just 102 days from today.** Because we hit our ambitious grassroots fundraising goal last month, we were able to make critical investments in key early states. But we need to keep growing if we're going to win. Right now, our organizing team is pulling a lot of late nights gearing up for the home stretch, and they need reinforcements. Plans are in motion -- now, the question is whether those organizers will have the resources to make the most of these last 100 days. That's what this deadline is all about. And I'm hoping everyone reading this email can do a small part to help -- **so today I'm announcing a goal of raising $725,000 before the end of the month.** **Will you chip in a donation today to help reach our grassroots goal before the October deadline?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | | | | Our monthly fundraising deadline next week is a very big deal, friend. Here's why: Voters will start weighing in come February, just 102 days from today. Because we hit our ambitious grassroots fundraising goal last month, we were able to make critical investments in key early states. But we need to keep growing if we're going to win. Right now, our organizing team is pulling a lot of late nights gearing up for the home stretch, and they need reinforcements. Plans are in motion -- now, the question is whether those organizers will have the resources to make the most of these last 100 days. That's what this deadline is all about. And I'm hoping everyone reading this email can do a small part to help -- so today I'm announcing a goal of raising $725,000 before the end of the month. Will you chip in a donation today to help reach our grassroots goal before the October deadline? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" This team has a habit of rising to the occasion in the moments that matter most. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump dismantles yet another environmental protection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, The Tongass National Forest in Alaska is one of the most pristine regions of untouched nature in America, filled with salmon creeks, fjords, and glaciers stretching from mountaintops down to the icy waters surrounding Juneau. It's a preserved 16 million acres of unbelievable beauty, so of course Donald Trump wants to tear it apart for profit. Trump announced that he was undoing a nearly two decades-long regulation that limits logging in the Tongass National Forest. This is just the latest in a string of environmental regulations unravelled and shredded by Trump and his pro-massive corporation, anti-science, climate change-denying EPA. We need to hear what engaged voters think about this issue: **Should Democrats fight logging in our national forests?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd85/6e9863e8/15db577c/1db08f88/518077936/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/ox_wQyKx") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd85/6e9863e8/15db577c/1db08f88/518077936/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/ox_wQyKx") Thank you for your response. -The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd85/6e9863e8/15db577c/1db08f8e/518077936/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191024a.ND-b&refcode2=9yfLMg4HvXnI1s0xvyrF")
---
|
---

---

PO Box 15320
Washington, DC 20003

Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of the 50 United States, District of Columbia and Puerto Rico; those 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law); and those who would be lawfully permitted to accept the prize under applicable federal, state and local law. Winner is responsible for taxes associated with the prize. Sweepstakes is independently overseen and conducted by SCA Promotions, Inc. subject: rising to the challenge

body:
http://lipinskiforcongress.com/ [http://lipinskiforcongress.com/]
During last week’s presidential debate, the moderators didn’t ask a single question about climate change.

If you believe that climate change is one of the biggest issues we’re facing, and must be addressed with commonsense solutions, then sign our petition today:

https://secure.ngpvan.com/OtSjiBGwLkyM1Hia1HOzMQ2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/OtSjiBGwLkyM1Hia1HOzMQ2]

Thanks,
Lipinski HQ

Begin forwarded message from Dan Lipinski:

Peter,

Last week, 12 Democratic candidates for president took the stage to discuss the most pressing issues plaguing our country. Somehow, there was not a single question regarding the climate crisis.

This is unacceptable, and we must demand that our leaders take climate change seriously. It’s an issue that’s already affecting Illinoisans on a daily basis.

Climate change is one of the biggest issues we’re facing, and we must take action to address it. If you agree, add your name to our petition now. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/OtSjiBGwLkyM1Hia1HOzMQ2]

Sign on today [https://secure.ngpvan.com/OtSjiBGwLkyM1Hia1HOzMQ2]

In Congress, I’m facing climate change head-on. Last year, I joined the Climate Solutions Caucus, and I have a 90% lifetime score from the League of Conservation Voters. I’ve been fighting to promote energy efficiency, reduce greenhouse gas emissions, and ensure that all Americans have safe drinking water.

We don’t have time to waste on our climate; we must rise and find solutions NOW. Sign our petition if you’re with me:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/OtSjiBGwLkyM1Hia1HOzMQ2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/OtSjiBGwLkyM1Hia1HOzMQ2]

Thank you,

Dan

Dan, an engineer and former teacher, has brought hundreds of millions of dollars in critical infrastructure projects to Illinois, fought for better schools, protections for our seniors, reforms to fix our broken Congress, and sought to make healthcare more affordable for all. We are grateful for your support. Please take a moment to like Dan on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/danlipinskiforcongress/] or follow Dan on Twitter [https://twitter.com/DanLipinski] . If you’d like to contribute to help Dan keep fighting in Congress, you can click here to support Dan’s reelection now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-general?refcode=footer&amount=20&recurring=auto]

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Schiff’s Secret Bombshells
body:
“Bombshell. The walls are closing in ... That’s more or less been the unanimous chorus in the impeachment press since Tuesday.” | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=66812f6d26&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Schiff’s Secret Bombshells**

“Bombshell. The walls are closing in ... That’s more or less been the unanimous chorus in the impeachment press since Tuesday,” _The Wall Street Journal_ editorial board writes.

The problem? The left’s media narrative relies on nothing but opening statements from their hearings—and leaks from Democrats themselves.

“The self-described goal of Mr. Schiff’s hearings is to impeach and remove from office a President elected by 63 million Americans. This requires more transparency and public scrutiny than Mr. Schiff’s unprecedented process of secret testimony, followed by selective leaks to the friendly media to put everything in the most anti-Trump light, in order to sway public opinion.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6c1a3da5d0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Hours after President Donald Trump announced at the White House that Turkey has agreed to a cease fire in Syria, he boarded Air Force One” en route to Pittsburgh, where he addressed a major conference on shale energy production, Megan Tomasic and Natasha Lindstrom report for the _[Pittsburgh Tribune-Review](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=782568263d&e=3ee4985eea)_. “Nobody does it better than the hard-working men and women of Marcellus shale country,” he said.
---
|
---
| “First lady Melania Trump embarked on her first solo visit to Capitol Hill Wednesday to discuss the opioid crisis with a bipartisan group of lawmakers,” Marina Pitofsky reports in _[The Hill](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b9c03a79e7&e=3ee4985eea)_. “The event marked the one-year anniversary of the signing of the SUPPORT for Patients and Communities Act, which provides funding for training surrounding the opioid crisis, as well as for care.”
---
|
---
| This week, Second Lady Karen Pence spoke at a Military Spouse Employment Partnership induction ceremony, "bringing in 42 new employers who have pledged to recruit, hire and retain military spouses," Karen Jowers reports in the _[Military Times](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e0502fcbbb&e=3ee4985eea)_. “The Military Spouse Employment Partnership is so important to reducing the unemployment rate among our military spouses,” Mrs. Pence said.
---
|
---
| Secretary of State Mike Pompeo and Adviser to the President Ivanka Trump are in Wichita, Kansas, where they’ll visit today with some of the city's aviation workers, [KAKE News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=97003c47cc&e=3ee4985eea) reports. “After the roundtable, a group of Wichita-based aviation companies will sign the Pledge to America's Workers, including Spirit AeroSystems.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=80b7ddd090&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b365cd4a8b&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=ae38c8a061)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Stefanie Conahan
subject: Spotlight: 2019 elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | [](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjIzMTM3MDMS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMTQ5MzcwMgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
|
---
| Friends,

With all eyes on 2020, it's easy to forget that **we 're less than two weeks away from critical elections in cities and states across the country.** But our path to victory in 2020 begins now.

In this week's Off the Sidelines Spotlight, **we 're highlighting key races and sharing ways you can get involved,** whether or not there's an election in your district.

Thank you,
Stefanie

Stefanie Conahan
Executive Director, Off the Sidelines

---
| • **Three states hold gubernatorial elections this year: Kentucky, Louisiana and Mississippi.** Kentucky and Mississippi vote on November 5, and Louisiana's runoff will be held on November 16.
• **Louisiana, Mississippi and Virginia also have state legislative elections this yea****r**. All 80 seats in New Jersey's General Assembly (the state's lower house) are up for a vote in 2019.
• **Voters in Washington State and Pennsylvania can weigh in on statewide ballot measures** on November 5.
• **All eyes on Virginia:** All 140 seats in Virginia's bicameral state legislature are up for grabs, and **Democrats need to flip just two seats in each chamber to take control.** A majority in the state's General Assembly would give Democrats the opportunity to make real progress on issues like gun violence prevention, affordable health care and reversing partisan gerrymandering.

---
| **READ** | This [_New York Times_ piece](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjIzMTM3MDMS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMTQ5MzcwMgS2&mt=1&rt=0) on this year's gubernatorial elections, and how Democrats have a real shot at winning in the deep south
**READ** | Planned Parenthood Action Fund's [explainer](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjIzMTM3MDMS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMTQ5MzcwMgS2&mt=1&rt=0) on how Virginia's elections could impact reproductive health care in the state
**LISTEN** | This [NPR piece](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjIzMTM3MDMS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMTQ5MzcwMgS2&mt=1&rt=0) on how the gun safety debate is front-and-center in Virginia's elections
**READ** | Openly LGBTQ individuals, including a number running for state and local office in 2019, [tell their coming out stories](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjIzMTM3MDMS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMTQ5MzcwMgS2&mt=1&rt=0) in _The Advocate_

---
| **REGISTER TO VOTE:** Visit [vote.org](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjIzMTM3MDMS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMTQ5MzcwMgS2&mt=1&rt=0) to check your registration status and get state-by-state information on the upcoming election

**GET INFORMED:** Enter your address on [BallotReady](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjIzMTM3MDMS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMTQ5MzcwMgS2&mt=1&rt=0) and you'll get a custom read-out on all of the candidates and referenda on your personal ballot

**VOLUNTEER:** A number of organizations offer opportunities to volunteer both on-the-ground and remotely. Here are just a few:
* [Swing Left](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjIzMTM3MDMS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMTQ5MzcwMgS2&mt=1&rt=0) has a handy tool that customizes volunteer and activism opportunities based on your zip code
* [Sister District](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjIzMTM3MDMS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMTQ5MzcwMgS2&mt=1&rt=0) is organizing volunteers to elect Democrats in state legislatures in key states
* [The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjIzMTM3MDMS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMTQ5MzcwMgS2&mt=1&rt=0) has a massive list of volunteer opportunities, which you can filter by priority, type of event, location, and date/time

---
| | In 2018, women turned out to vote at record rates--**when we make our voices heard, we make history.** Let's do it again:

[**Donate to Off the Sidelines today to elect women candidates up and down the ballot in 2020.**](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjIzMTM3MDMS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMTQ5MzcwMgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
|
---
| Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
---
| _Contributions or gifts to Off the Sidelines PAC are not tax-deductible. Off the Sidelines PAC does not accept contributions from federal lobbyists, corporate and/or trade association PACs, or "for profit" business entities, including but not limited to sole proprietorships, partnerships, and LLCs._

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving messages from Kirsten altogether, [click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages05.net/gfppcinc/unsubscribe/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=22313703&spUserID=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&spJobID=MTYwMTQ5MzcwMgS2&spReportId=MTYwMTQ5MzcwMgS2).
---
clean_body: | | | | Friends, With all eyes on 2020, it's easy to forget that we 're less than two weeks away from critical elections in cities and states across the country. But our path to victory in 2020 begins now. In this week's Off the Sidelines Spotlight, we 're highlighting key races and sharing ways you can get involved, whether or not there's an election in your district. Thank you, Stefanie Stefanie Conahan Executive Director, Off the Sidelines | • Three states hold gubernatorial elections this year: Kentucky, Louisiana and Mississippi. Kentucky and Mississippi vote on November 5, and Louisiana's runoff will be held on November 16. • Louisiana, Mississippi and Virginia also have state legislative elections this year. All 80 seats in New Jersey's General Assembly (the state's lower house) are up for a vote in 2019. • Voters in Washington State and Pennsylvania can weigh in on statewide ballot measures on November 5. • All eyes on Virginia: All 140 seats in Virginia's bicameral state legislature are up for grabs, and Democrats need to flip just two seats in each chamber to take control. A majority in the state's General Assembly would give Democrats the opportunity to make real progress on issues like gun violence prevention, affordable health care and reversing partisan gerrymandering. | READ | This on this year's gubernatorial elections, and how Democrats have a real shot at winning in the deep south READ | Planned Parenthood Action Fund's on how Virginia's elections could impact reproductive health care in the state LISTEN | This on how the gun safety debate is front-and-center in Virginia's elections READ | Openly LGBTQ individuals, including a number running for state and local office in 2019, in The Advocate | REGISTER TO VOTE: Visit to check your registration status and get state-by-state information on the upcoming election GET INFORMED: Enter your address on and you'll get a custom read-out on all of the candidates and referenda on your personal ballot VOLUNTEER: A number of organizations offer opportunities to volunteer both on-the-ground and remotely. name: SaraGideon.com
subject: We sent you an email back in September. Here's what happened after:
body:
That's a big drop!
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cb4/4bef7a87/6b224ad4/287fda26/3422919415/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Numbers don't lie, .
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cb4/4bef7a87/6b224ad4/287fda25/3422919415/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMjQtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october?refcode=em191024-full")
Susan Collins' approval rating is plummeting. _**She 's dropped 2 points just since September!**_
And she lost the most ground with independent voters. That's especially important in a race this close - that demographic is going to be _key._
**These numbers prove that Sara can win - but she can't do it alone. Can we count on your help?**
[**Make a $3 contribution to our campaign to defeat Susan Collins and elect a leader who will put Maine first. We can win this election if we all work together.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cb4/4bef7a87/6b224ad4/287fda25/3422919415/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMjQtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october?refcode=em191024-full")
Democrats' path to taking back the Senate cuts right through Maine - we're the single most flippable state this cycle! We have to come through.
Let's do this,
\- Team Sara
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cb4/4bef7a87/6b224ad4/287fda25/3422919415/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMjQtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october?refcode=em191024-full")****

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cb4/4bef7a87/6b224ad4/287fda24/3422919415/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cb4/4bef7a87/6b224ad4/287fda3b/3422919415/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Trump's returning the favor for Cory Gardner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
Cory Gardner is gearing up for a major fundraising month (with some help from friends in the White House) - we have to keep up. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771484/691c9bd/6fd07786/11a78b86/2694545052/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_template")
---
| Team, November is right around the corner, and with it comes a fundraising milestone. [**_Can you rush in a donation of $26 before our end-of-month deadline?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191024_JH_20191024-fr-JH-EOM1-all_all_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

This one is important, because November is shaping up to be another big month for Cory Gardner in terms of the high-dollar donations that are keeping his campaign afloat. Here's why:

Earlier this month, Gardner jetted off to a fundraising retreat to help Donald Trump bring in a bundle of big checks for his re-election campaign. And now we know that, in just a few weeks, the president is returning the favor.

**Trump is hosting a three-day "Save the Senate" fundraiser at his hotel in D.C. for a small group of Republican Senators--and we all know Cory Gardner is at the top of that list. **The other side sees this as an opportunity for Gardner to widen the fundraising gap between our campaign and his.

In the first weeks of this campaign, we showed the world that we can keep up, team. And we absolutely cannot fall behind now. This won't be the last time Cory Gardner leans on his special interest allies in Washington for support. They know their best hope of holding on to this Senate seat is with a boatload of special interest cash.

**We can 't let them buy this race. Chip in whatever you can right now, and make sure we don't fall farther behind:** _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through right away._ [**_DONATE $5 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_20191024_JH_20191024-fr-JH-EOM1-all_all_expresslane5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE $10 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_20191024_JH_20191024-fr-JH-EOM1-all_all_expresslane10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE $25 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em_fr_20191024_JH_20191024-fr-JH-EOM1-all_all_expresslane25&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE $50 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_fr_20191024_JH_20191024-fr-JH-EOM1-all_all_expresslane50&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE $100 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_fr_20191024_JH_20191024-fr-JH-EOM1-all_all_expresslane100&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191024_JH_20191024-fr-JH-EOM1-all_all_expresslaneother&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=") Thank you, John [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191024_JH_20191024-fr-JH-EOM1-all_all_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771484/691c9bd/6fd07786/11a78bbf/2694545052/VEsHBQ/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771484/691c9bd/6fd07786/11a78bbc/2694545052/VEsHBA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771484/691c9bd/6fd07786/11a78bbd/2694545052/VEsHBw/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771484/691c9bd/6fd07786/11a78bba/2694545052/VEsHBg/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771484/691c9bd/6fd07786/11a78bbb/2694545052/VEsHAQ/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771484/691c9bd/6fd07786/11a78bb8/2694545052/VEsHAA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information [_**here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771484/691c9bd/6fd07786/11a78bbf/2694545052/VEsHAw/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer").

"=" "=" "=" "=" "=" "=" Thank you, John "=" | | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218 Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible. If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by "". Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on "", "", "", and "". We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe "". If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information "".

clean_body: Democrats are pouring millions into Texas to... Friend,2018 was proof that if the Democrats spend enough money, they can buy seats in Congress.Now they’re DOUBLING DOWN for 2020... haven’t even reached the primaries yet, and it’s being reported that $39.6 MILLION have been poured into House races right here in the Lone Star State.This is personal for me...Nancy Pelosi and her Hollywood donors bought the conservative congressional district I live in. But I’m running to win it back. Not only has Texas long been a stronghold for conservative values and the American spirit, it’s also our last line of defense in keeping Democrats and their radical agenda from completely taking over.Republicans could once again carry Michigan, Wisconsin and even Pennsylvania... ...But if Democrats manage to flip Texas and all 38 of its electoral votes, then 2020 is over before it even begins. We can’t let 2020 be a repeat of 2018. We must take a stand now before it’s too late.I went to West Point and joined the Army to defend our freedoms, NOT to stand by as radical politicians shred the Constitution in favor of socialism.That’s why I’m running to take back this district that was bought by Pelosi in 2018, so that we can ensure Texas remains a beacon of conservatism for years to come. Thank you, Hunt Officer of the U.S. Army Aviation Branch (ret.) Republican Candidate for Congress| 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056| Paid for by Hunt for Congress. subject: Texans deserve safe water!

body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/OBPP6lQbnUz7alNZ3I1onfQ5lwAFIl0_8xKGD-RDKKA=/AjUo7XGgBtgECArYRX7DanSg6N6qa_XkihcueGczn1o=?refcode=20191025_flintja)
---
[**SIGN ON NOW:**** Demand Congress address America's failing lead pipe infrastructure ⇒ **](https://act.myngp.com/el/OBPP6lQbnUz7alNZ3I1onfQ5lwAFIl0_8xKGD-RDKKA=/U9SRNYZT5O11a5uHoVpLv7teXUFNEA4ca9qTWxBXRh8=) Team, Flint's water crisis began in 2014, over five years ago. And yet they still have unsafe water due to high levels of lead in their water pipes. **Now, this is becoming a national problem -- Americans across the country are discovering unsafe levels of lead in their drinking water.** **Simply put , this is an environmental justice issue! Areas with lower-income and higher minority populations are more likely to suffer from contaminated water. [That's why I'm urging Congress to take action and address our failing water pipes -- because EVERY American deserves access to clean and safe water. Join me in taking action today!](https://act.myngp.com/el/OBPP6lQbnUz7alNZ3I1onfQ5lwAFIl0_8xKGD-RDKKA=/B_Ei3HLtu-QpSJ4o1dIuApJkbRbISm-1c7nWcvuo-jY=)** | ******[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.myngp.com/el/OBPP6lQbnUz7alNZ3I1onfQ5lwAFIl0_8xKGD-RDKKA=/B_Ei3HLtu-QpSJ4o1dIuApJkbRbISm-1c7nWcvuo-jY=)******
---

Even here in Texas, [a study](https://act.myngp.com/el/OBPP6lQbnUz7alNZ3I1onfQ5lwAFIl0_8xKGD-RDKKA=/B9y1Sf0zrk4yIyPY97XlCh0JGBQkGn2XMCyrPBJZxM4=) this past summer found a lower income Houston-area neighborhood had lead-contaminated water. And shockingly, in the past few years Texas has [received an "F"](https://act.myngp.com/el/OBPP6lQbnUz7alNZ3I1onfQ5lwAFIl0_8xKGD-RDKKA=/uJxuAm5WTJpBBZSq9MsNUaPpMbYdurjStYRP7rrN7kc=) grade for the level of lead in drinking water at _schools_ , putting our children at serious risk!
[**It 's time for this issue to be addressed at the national level to ensure every American has access to safe drinking water. Sign on to demand Congress to fix our lead pipes NOW!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/OBPP6lQbnUz7alNZ3I1onfQ5lwAFIl0_8xKGD-RDKKA=/B_Ei3HLtu-QpSJ4o1dIuApJkbRbISm-1c7nWcvuo-jY=)

Sri Preston Kulkarni

Friend,

If Democrats take the Senate – we are in big trouble.

One of the most important Senate seats is up for grabs this election and I really need your help – and I need it today.

You see, our nation needs fighters in the United States Senate. We need Senators that will stand strong with President Trump against the onslaught of attacks from the Left.

One Senator that has boldly stood up for our president's agenda in Washington is Senator Steve Daines; **_and I know he has no plan to back down, no matter what the Left throws at him_.** [](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=5c58512e72b64329bae3facdd1b4bf8c&_e=rwX3x22pbhtY9fnfz-aEr9lS7UJ4XPzCu3CQiVsHgRLm2KC09r4ABibjJvNoiIQ-S5cSAaYT0MrygAv-dOEXMZawJCAKAmNZVbCGGP4ZxzudRks1xhvzQ9AbzdSO7wvyahhaVtDQqdT9kaENC9zofijJFiXI2s9h3RRT5NHkf7D_bIkyy0JQOKcdpDovadx1aYrlKEK58vZ8v1YWgQALr3B1vQ4-GKeqftGrBwLiMuOwiMp3qCF8JRVat-IbtOUdGDrp6OeZtUHj3t_3K1g3qtNCkIezy2w-qfUHnX7-DcJp6a4tkEG6iqkbxKfqzIvlZjxt5pSOxnldyePvMLsU1yz6agzDjj4hJg88XKSfLhCkFBUqTV17HdjSPCZmzYe0)

name: Andrew Yang
subject: What they did was criminal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
This country cannot afford to let the opioid crisis continue unchecked.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=2123%2E377263%2ES4DmIx) **Big Pharma is getting rich by spreading a plague among our people.

[Add your name to support my proposal to hold them accountable](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-opioidcrisis-petition-20191023?source=email-20191024AM-all&t=6&akid=2123%2E377263%2ES4DmIx)** Yang Gang --

Every hour, eight Americans die from overdoses. It’s gotten so bad that drug overdoses have overtaken car accidents as one of the top causes of death in America, and our nation’s life expectancy has decreased for the last three years.

**It’s a crisis of capitalism run amok.**

Our government was complicit in enabling this epidemic because they looked the other way while Purdue Pharma and others dispensed hundreds of thousands of OxyContin prescriptions as a non-addictive wonder drug. And now we’re all grappling with the aftermath.

During the debate last week, I gave an answer that has gotten a lot of people talking. I talked about putting the resources back into the communities that were destroyed so our people could have a fighting chance to get well.

Drug companies are now settling lawsuits for a tiny fraction of their overall profits from killing our people. They need to be held accountable.

But the opioid crisis cannot be solved by money alone. We need to let people know that if they are addicted, they won’t be referred to a prison cell but rather to treatment and counseling.

I spoke to an EMT in New Hampshire who said he sees the same people suffering from addiction over and over again. Every time he saves someone from overdosing, they overdose again the following week. As president, I will:
* Decriminalize small quantities of opioids so those who are addicted can be sent to treatment instead of jail
* Impose a tax on companies that sold opioids to fund treatment and rehabilitation
* Direct the FDA to regulate Big Pharma’s marketing tactics
* Destigmatize medication-based treatment for addiction, as these treatments have been shown to be effective at lowering addiction rates

[**Sign this petition to send a message to Big Pharma that they created this problem, and now they’re going to have to help solve it.**](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-opioidcrisis-petition-20191023?source=email-20191024AM-all&t=8&akid=2123%2E377263%2ES4DmIx) | [sign the petition](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-opioidcrisis-petition-20191023?source=email-20191024AM-all&t=7&akid=2123%2E377263%2ES4DmIx)
---
It goes without saying that I don’t -- and never would -- take money from Big Pharma. But we need to go further. We need to fundamentally change the way healthcare is administered in our country.

Our government needs to protect people from dangerous and addictive drugs. And they need to care for people who were hurt while we looked the other way.

That’s exactly what I’ll do as president.

-Andrew
**Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us keep building this movement.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/14888?t=2&akid=2123%2E377263%2ES4DmIx)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=3&akid=2123%2E377263%2ES4DmIx) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=2123%2E377263%2ES4DmIx) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

[ ]If everyone reading this email gives $3, we’re not only going to have enough money to stay competitive but we’re going to change how campaigns are run altogether. Can we count you in? Beto is running this race the right way. And you are making that possible. Thanks, Team Beto [ ]Contribute Contribute to Beto's campaign:

body:

Begin Forwarded Message:

name: Margaret Good
subject: Sign on: Help me turn the tide on threats to our water!
body:
Hi friend,

It’s past time we take action to protect our Florida water systems by updating our stormwater rules and fighting for new clean water protections.

As all Floridians know, water is our state's most precious resource. Not only is it a driving force in our state economy, but it’s also a defining aspect of our culture. When our state refuses to take the immediate needs of our environment seriously, they ignore the needs and wellbeing of all Florida families.

Become a Citizen Supporter and fight for this issue! Join us in the fight to keep Florida water safe and clean! » [https://secure.ngpvan.com/4VZ5ur_F1UyMte18X-SSkw2]

It’s time to address red tide, blue-green algae, and to clean up the canals, creeks, lakes, and rivers polluted with nutrients and bacteria. Florida families deserve to know their elected leaders are doing everything they can to keep their family (including pets!) safe as they enjoy a defining aspect of living in our great state.

I’ve been proud to lead the effort to reform our stormwater laws in our state capitol, and when I’m elected to Congress, I will be a leader in fighting to update our clean water regulations that our representative Congressman Vern Buchanan dismantled, when he voted to repeal the

Clean Water Rule, a law that works to keep the sources of drinking water sources clean and safe for one in three people in the country.

Join me now in this work by signing your name to be a Citizen Supporter of this important issue!
[https://secure.ngpvan.com/4VZ5ur_F1UyMte18X-SSkw2]

-Margaret

If you wish to receive fewer emails, please click here. To be removed from this email list, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/4e5ebb54-04f5-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68/579943ce-a7f6-e911-828b-2818784d6d68?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Nzk5NDNjZS1hN2Y2LWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q8iqj4ifThqHyculC4jQfHKX9Zi5Mux5Si_B4oB65SM=&id=113801977&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com .

Margaret Good for Congress
PO Box 5073
Sarasota , FL 34277
United States

#
Thanks to supporters like you, we had a strong fundraising quarter. However, our numbers have fallen off since then and we’re running out of time to make up ground. **We need to raise $25,000 in SEVEN DAYS to hit our October goal.**

[**Can you rush a donation right now?**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=467241338f&e=02cd889ad3)

---
| This monthly fundraising deadline is critical for two reasons:

**First, the next Democrat debate is in Georgia! **Radical donors, the national liberal media, and EVERY Democrat running for President are descending on Georgia. They will do whatever it takes to flip our state and end the Republican Senate majority.

[**Help us show them the road to socialism will NEVER run through Georgia.**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=3fa22cf34a&e=02cd889ad3)

**Second, as Georgia goes, so goes the White House and Senate majority. **Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden have guaranteed victory in Georgia. Elizabeth Warren is already building a field team here. One of our Democrat opponents raised $800,000 in just THREE WEEKS.

We must raise as much as we can NOW, so that we’re ready for the onslaught coming our way. And with BOTH of Georgia’s Senate seats on the ballot, our monthly fundraising deadlines are even more crucial.

[**We’re $25,000 short of our October goal. We only have ONE WEEK to make up ground. Please, stand with me and chip in now. No amount is too small.**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=678ec07e1d&e=02cd889ad3)

Thank you for everything.

David

name: Team Stanton
subject: it's time for McConnell to put politics aside
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Do you think corruption and dark money in our politics is hurting our democracy?

Do you think we need to upgrade our election infrastructure to protect our elections from foreign interference?

Do you think making our democracy stronger and safer should be a non-partisan priority?

**If you said yes to any of these, then you will probably agree with Greg that it is time for Mitch McConnell to put politics aside and let the US Senate vote on H.R. 1, the _For The People Act_ , to protect and strengthen our democratic institutions!**

subject: Could Pelosi abandon impeachment effort?
body:
**Conservative News Alert**
**From Fox News:**
# Could Pelosi abandon impeachment effort? Legal analyst predicts she may
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DloELB-JRpTwSBkswL4L4e3Idpv1ThrORxw_cGH5D7ZnNzzLX_I_w8-Eo4phXVV4ZyteFdZOhrSHBb5T2peDGfu-2-aQ0vXKR6Ylrjmwun_bkgr4pbqLTsbW3aVHuU9Iy3iUvgi5LeeJZkNTT8WEypVUXpDB4DqY6xhNul2cWsBsEktvKzF62eDQ9wUT21u12UU1gV46zCH9HRswV3PJDy7JkPZ4YgIk&c=6JnH8mlNnnfASBKlAFF4Lg8U_CRcp1moklQAgsEK3AkKZynn-iOpsA==&ch=6yoFExNTDdTJ4kRg-h3cbsOHo-wY_odMP_GwYqoqRbCDZvXPPyzMyw==)
[Democrats](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DloELB-JRpTwSBkswL4L4e3Idpv1ThrORxw_cGH5D7ZnNzzLX_I_w8-Eo4phXVV48UrT8Ven11KVNQViT-h6BX3pqNmnlvhrW8tzpFAAehE9toYIkdSyejvWt__HxhI5DDKGLtS_3qZt8cxxIWdGYEMBdWBHW8CImXnAhjvNipV5rJyRGnNILAkNctWMZw8CH6Msd2SNxNsBNETbzsefVsrCOWDWpDZNx6WH0UkeEnwuiLG8uzAHhrL76R5-0GZY4RGeOrriqEo=&c=6JnH8mlNnnfASBKlAFF4Lg8U_CRcp1moklQAgsEK3AkKZynn-iOpsA==&ch=6yoFExNTDdTJ4kRg-h3cbsOHo-wY_odMP_GwYqoqRbCDZvXPPyzMyw==) "may end up walking away" from their effort to impeach President Donald Trump, predicted Doug Burns, who is a former federal prosecutor in the Criminal Division of the Eastern District of New York and a practicing attorney.
[Click here to read more](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DloELB-JRpTwSBkswL4L4e3Idpv1ThrORxw_cGH5D7ZnNzzLX_I_w8-Eo4phXVV4ZyteFdZOhrSHBb5T2peDGfu-2-aQ0vXKR6Ylrjmwun_bkgr4pbqLTsbW3aVHuU9Iy3iUvgi5LeeJZkNTT8WEypVUXpDB4DqY6xhNul2cWsBsEktvKzF62eDQ9wUT21u12UU1gV46zCH9HRswV3PJDy7JkPZ4YgIk&c=6JnH8mlNnnfASBKlAFF4Lg8U_CRcp1moklQAgsEK3AkKZynn-iOpsA==&ch=6yoFExNTDdTJ4kRg-h3cbsOHo-wY_odMP_GwYqoqRbCDZvXPPyzMyw==)
# From The Daily Caller:
# Texas Politicians React To Jury Deciding Against Father Who Doesn't Want His Seven-Year-Old Son To Be Transitioned To A Girl
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DloELB-JRpTwSBkswL4L4e3Idpv1ThrORxw_cGH5D7ZnNzzLX_I_w8-Eo4phXVV4qeg6glIE9KutnrtlXbu-OM6r0ofkwrXfC8AOLiaWYuj_laop4yql9V9WsTXUmdUB0GFnZazlP6XdDM2LM-_BCmR4LZ8lPyWOhzF1SSPZP6p19JxspfJrsqcionvqtELZvrPZuQ7QcUhNTTyS3STJWQdZUFCVHVeu&c=6JnH8mlNnnfASBKlAFF4Lg8U_CRcp1moklQAgsEK3AkKZynn-iOpsA==&ch=6yoFExNTDdTJ4kRg-h3cbsOHo-wY_odMP_GwYqoqRbCDZvXPPyzMyw==)
"This is horrifying & tragic. For a parent to subject such a young child to life-altering hormone blockers to medically transition their sex is nothing less than child abuse," Republican Texas Sen. Ted Cruz [tweeted](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DloELB-JRpTwSBkswL4L4e3Idpv1ThrORxw_cGH5D7ZnNzzLX_I_w8-Eo4phXVV4oFk0fJZh7LX5y3xmH3XHDUon4P5XhXalavEKFWy9V7eM2WRVdyr6Qg6TzWXyOGRKoMwGHQcaeC-jgEaxvzoJT8P-wXP9tss6RGN5fnSPtEQuvk77hryiuuHdQh822arT&c=6JnH8mlNnnfASBKlAFF4Lg8U_CRcp1moklQAgsEK3AkKZynn-iOpsA==&ch=6yoFExNTDdTJ4kRg-h3cbsOHo-wY_odMP_GwYqoqRbCDZvXPPyzMyw==) Wednesday.

name: Michael Bennet
subject: humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Friend: In a moment, [I'm going to ask you to make a $29 donation to my campaign, but first let me tell you why.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae94/134673f2/a2894df/6997fc86/2587955521/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-oct-goal?refcode=EM_FR_B1_102419_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

I crunched the numbers with my finance team, and we're short of our goal this month.

[We've launched ads, opened new offices, and hired field staff, but we need to raise another $175,000 before Halloween if we're going to keep building at the pace we need to win!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae94/134673f2/a2894df/6997fc85/2587955521/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-oct-goal?refcode=EM_FR_B1_102419_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

While other candidates are starting to burn out after months or even years in the spotlight, I'm just getting started.

Since I refuse to take contributions from corporate special interests, every step I take in this journey is because grassroots supporters like you are with me, ensuring our campaign has what it takes to win this hard-fought race.

[The average online donation to my campaign is $29, but any amount you donate today will help us reach this crucial goal. Team, I'm asking, will you chip in today? >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae94/134673f2/a2894df/6997fc86/2587955521/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-oct-goal?refcode=EM_FR_B1_102419_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[We will win this election the same way we always have: by presenting a compelling and unifying vision for our country.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae94/134673f2/a2894df/6997fc85/2587955521/VEsP/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-oct-goal?refcode=EM_FR_B1_102419_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

This act was nothing more than an attempt to grab headlines and distract from the seriousness of this investigation. As a Navy veteran, Adam takes our national security VERY seriously. Obviously Ross Spano is more interested in political stunts than he is in keeping our country safe, and once again it looks like he thinks the law doesn't apply to him. | Florida deserves better. Sign our petition to condemn Spano’s actions today and to demand more from him and our elected officials. -Team Hattersley Adam Hattersley is Navy Veteran and local state representative working to flip Florida's 15th Congressional District. | | Adam Hattersley is running to represent Florida's 15th Congressional District. name: Mary Sorteberg
subject: For Jeff's birthday, support the charities at the border
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c899/6cd27893/522f4977/15876ac3/1302354799/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | I remember the day when Jeff told me he was going to go down to the border to investigate what was happening with the children that he had heard were being caged by our government. Having been married to Jeff for 27 years, I was not surprised for a minute with his decision. We didn't know what to expect from his visit, but as Jeff said that day, "I _f it's true, we have to do something._ " You remember what happened: He became the first senator to see children in cages at a border processing station. He went to a huge former WalMart warehousing kids and demanded to be let in. They refused. They even called the local police on him. And then, America woke up. **We all learned what was happening to those children. ****What our own government --led by our callous president--is doing to those children. ** This fight isn't over. Every single day, there are brave people who are fighting to release the children, protect their rights, support the families seeking to reconnect with loved ones. **Today is Jeff's birthday.** I know that it would mean so much to him if you would **[donate a few dollars to the charities fighting for those children at the border.](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c899/6cd27893/522f4977/15876ac0/1302354799/VEsE/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mmborderkids?refcode=2019-10-24-merkbday")** Your donation will make a critical difference to these nonprofit organizations at the front lines of the struggle. Your donation will help these children. name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: Houstonian’s Lives Are Not for Sale
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Marc Flores for Congress
body:
Dear Peter,

Why do so many people in one of Houston’s poorest neighborhoods have cancer?

Many believe it is because of a cancer causing chemical released by various train companies like Union Pacific at the Englewood Railyard. This illuminating expose from The Houston Chronicle shined a light on the issue (https://www.houstonchronicle.com/business/article/Houston-neighborhood-reckons-with-railroad-yard-13753933.php?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=6048d93c53-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_16_08_11_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-6048d93c53-32267927) .

The chemical remains below 101 households in the area. I’ve met with one of those homeowners, Joetta Stevenson. She wonders, “Did that have something to do with the breast cancer I had?”

Rather than clean up the neighborhood, Union Pacific, offered residents $1,000 to waive their rights to protest chemicals at the railyard giving residents cancer.

The bottom line is this:

We must tell Union Pacific that the lives of Houstonians are worth more than $1,000. We must force Union Pacific, a corporation that has earned $24 billion in revenue in the past year, to clean up the deadly pollution in this area.

As someone with extensive experience bringing people from the private and public sectors together, I will hold Union Pacific accountable for cleaning up the polluted neighborhoods near the Englewood Railyard.

Texas’s Commission on Environmental Quality (TCEQ) is asking for further monitoring and extraction efforts in the area. As your representative, I will make sure that these steps are taken, and that the actions of corporations are held to the EPA’s standards.

It’s time to put the lives of Houstonians over the needs of a multi-billion dollar corporation.

We can do better! We will do better!

- Marc

body:

| | **TRUMP: I am building my wall around New Mexico** [**_This is the most important ask I 've ever made of you. Trump just claimed he's building his racist border wall around COLORADO, which would shut New Mexico out from the rest of the country. I need a historic response -- 1,500 gifts in the next 24 hours -- to make his attack BACKFIRE. I will not let him disrespect our state and our country without severe consequences. >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191024_em_fr_b1_lujan_all_v1&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250") I'm disgusted. I can hardly stomach this latest show of disrespect. \-- First, Trump swooped into my home state, held a despicable rally, and smeared my heritage. \-- Now, he announced he's building his wall around Colorado. Why -- to keep New Mexicans out? **I will not allow Trump to disrespect our state without consequences. ** I need a historic response -- 1,500 gifts in the next 24 hours -- to show Trump that he will NEVER win New Mexico. I'm counting on Democrats nationwide to have our back at this moment. Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. subject: Amy Klobuchar
