body:
[1]Beto for America

This morning, Amy Klobuchar locked down her final requirement and
officially qualified for the November democratic debate.

Beto still hasn’t qualified.

Because our grassroots team is usually so strong — we’ve never had to
worry before whether we’d be able to qualify for a debate. This is the
first time we’re seriously concerned Beto won’t have the chance to speak
his mind on the stage.

We’re doing everything in our power to beat the deadline and get all of
the requirements Beto needs to qualify — but pulling this off depends on
how much money we raise this week. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39702?refcode=ema20191024-63314&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=63314%2E444211%2EaljvWG ]Will you chip in $3
and prove that Beto deserves to be on that debate stage?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39702?refcode=ema20191024-63314&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=63314%2E444211%2EaljvWG ]Contribute $3

To be honest, it’s
frustrating to see how the media hasn’t fully captured the energy of our
campaign and the rare courage Beto has when it comes to fearlessly
confronting Trump’s dangerous agenda.

We know that a majority of Americans agree with Beto’s ideas.

We know that people love the way Beto speaks based on his own values,
convictions, and beliefs.

And we know that if there’s someone we can count on to fight tirelessly in
uniting our country after the bigotry, racism, and division this
Administration has sewn — it’s Beto.

If we qualify for this debate, it would send a strong message that Team
Beto is a force to be reckoned with in this race. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39702?refcode=ema20191024-63314&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=63314%2E444211%2EaljvWG ]Will you rush

- Team Beto

She loves talking with people about what they're passionate about, what issues keep them up at night, and what they want to change in their communities. She learns from -- and looks forward to -- every conversation.

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump told Republicans to "get tough," so they breached national security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, Trump has been throwing tantrums all over Washington and Twitter as the impeachment inquiry picks up steam and more witnesses testify. He's now encouraging Republicans to "get tough" and fight back against it \-- and yesterday they did exactly that in a bid to appease him and his base. Members of the House Freedom Caucus, some of Trump's most ardent supporters, protested outside of the secure hearing room yesterday and even gained entry, interrupting proceedings. They used unsecure phones and tweeted from the secure room, a violation of national security and federal law. When Republicans realized what they'd done, they tried to cover themselves by saying the tweets were from staff, but their hypocrisy and idiocy were on full display. The GOP isn't interested in a fair hearing \-- they know that can't possibly help Trump. They want a speedy end to this so they don't have to continually defend his illegal, immoral, and unethical actions. This whole protest was simply a show of force, intimidation, and loyalty for Trump because those are the only things he values. The wave of support for Trump's impeachment and removal from office is building, but we want to hear from you on this subject so we can have the clearest understanding of where the average Democratic voter stands: **Do you support the House impeachment inquiry?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc52/6e9863e8/15d66e1a/1db08e6a/3981455019/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/lXEDKMFv") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc52/6e9863e8/15d66e1a/1db08e6a/3981455019/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/lXEDKMFv") Thank you for answering our question, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc52/6e9863e8/15d66e1a/1db08e69/3981455019/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191024c.ND-b&refcode2=wqD5ueZAurlkFrgmlSkK")
---
|
---

| | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
---

PO Box 15320
Washington, DC 20003

[Unsubscribe](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc52/6e9863e8/15d66e1a/1db08e68/3981455019/VEsC/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/unsubscribe")

name: Bill Weld
subject: we should be concerned
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22QTbrxfBbsWSKLnwes7AeDwuG0almTZT7rKwoxdnpXGO5E2SFVQWgVm3z7bH1HGT0&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191024_fr_s&n=1) My plan today was to ask for your help with our digital ads campaign, but when I woke up this morning and scanned the news, I saw something I had to address. Right here, right now. A huge group of House GOP members protesting the impeachment inquiry into President Trump stormed a critical deposition happening as part of the investigation. [**Chip In Now to Help Bill Reclaim the Republican Party!**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22QTbrxfBbsWSKLnwes7AeDwuG0almTZT7rKwoxdnpXGO5E2SFVQWgVm3z7bH1HGT0&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191024_fr_s&n=2) | | [SUPPORT BILL ⇨](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22QTbrxfBbsWSKLnwes7AeDwuG0almTZT7rKwoxdnpXGO5E2SFVQWgVm3z7bH1HGT0&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191024_fr_s&n=3)
---
Why is that a problem? Because it demonstrates that President Trump has roped a good portion of the Republican Party into his charade of “no quid-pro-quo” (which, by the way, it was).
Everyone is entitled to their opinion on impeachment, everyone is entitled to use the agreed upon rules of the chamber to voice their concerns and opinions. **But we’re in the midst of a constitutional crisis, and to stoop to Donald Trump's level and resort to these childish tactics is unacceptable.**
Right now we have a party and a government that is all but consumed with protecting a corrupt president at all costs. **_We have to act now, and fight like hell to stop this madness before Donald Trump destroys both beyond repair._**
[**Can you chip in $50 right now to help us spread the message that we can and should demand better from our party and our president?**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22QTbrxfBbsWSKLnwes7AeDwuG0almTZT7rKwoxdnpXGO5E2SFVQWgVm3z7bH1HGT0&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191024_fr_s&n=4)
| [CHIP IN NOW ⇨](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22QTbrxfBbsWSKLnwes7AeDwuG0almTZT7rKwoxdnpXGO5E2SFVQWgVm3z7bH1HGT0&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191024_fr_s&n=5)
---
Thanks for fighting with me,
Bill

clean_body: | My plan today was to ask for your help with our digital ads campaign, but when I woke up this morning and scanned the news, I saw something I had to address. Right here, right now. A huge group of House GOP members protesting the impeachment inquiry into President Trump stormed a critical deposition happening as part of the investigation. | | Why is that a problem? Because it demonstrates that President Trump has roped a good portion of the Republican Party into his charade of “no quid-pro-quo” (which, by the way, it was). Everyone is entitled to their opinion on impeachment, everyone is entitled to use the agreed upon rules of the chamber to voice their concerns and opinions. But we’re in the midst of a constitutional crisis, and to stoop to Donald Trump's level and resort to these childish tactics is unacceptable. Right now we have a party and a government that is all but consumed with protecting a corrupt president at all costs. We have to act now, and fight like hell to stop this madness before Donald Trump destroys both beyond repair. | Thanks for fighting with me, Bill Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States

name: Tim
subject: This isn't the end
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
Friend,

I wanted to reach out and let you know that today, I've decided to withdraw from the Presidential race.

We started this campaign to give a voice to the forgotten people of our country: the workers who have been left behind, the small business owners who've been left behind; for the people who need health care, aren't able to get a quality education, or are saddled by tremendous debt. Because of you, we have been able to amplify the voices of these forgotten communities throughout the United States.

I will continue to fight and advocate for you, for all of the working people of our country -- white, black, brown; men, women, and everyone else. I'll keep fighting for the people who have to take a shower after work, who are fighting for dignity and respect in their workplaces. I'll continue to make sure those workers are treated fairly, that they have access to good health care, and that they have a solid pension to retire on.

But, for now, I wanted to say **thank you**. I appreciate the effort of our volunteers and staff, and especially folks like you who have chipped in and sacrificed to help get our campaign up and running.

[**You can watch my video message for friends, family and supporters here.**](https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9a2c/5486deaa/3e137f3e/dc84642/3680516120/VEsH/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8ykFEKMfUWQ&feature=youtu.be&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+You+can+watch+my+video+message+for+frien&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_90DO_1901024_1_1&source=TR_EM_FR_90DO_1901024_1_1")

This isn't the end. It's a New and Better beginning for working people in our country. I'll see you in the fight.

--Tim [CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr4c2020?recurring=true&amount=3&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+CONTRIBUTE&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_90DO_1901024_1_1&source=TR_EM_FR_90DO_1901024_1_1")
|
---

Contribute now to help Tim take his vision for our future across the United States! name: Matt's Personal iPhone
subject: Just off Fox News with Tucker Carlson
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
You won't believe this...
---
| | | | | | I will be quick...
Just finished my interview with Tucker Carlson and I knew I had to send you a quick note.
The Democrat Communications Department (the lamestream fake news media) is trying to distract the American people with absolute lunacy to cover up the fact that Adam Schiff and his deep-state allies like Nancy Pelosi are running a Kangaroo Court.
They don't care about the truth and are now bringing race into the question? San Fransisco Socialist, Rep. Jackie Spier, said this was a prank by 50-year-old white men? More identity politics and Trump Derangement Syndrome! And the fake news media is running with it!! I bet CNN, MSNBC, and the Washington Post didn't notice that Adam Schiff is 59 and also white.
I led the storming of Bull-Schiff's closed door meeting because I am the only person standing between the Deep-State and President Trump.
[I am going to keep fighting but the socialists in DC, Hollywood, and Silicon Valley (don't forget about the RINO Republicans that always rollover and cower down to their Democrat masters)... but I can't do this alone. ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Bk7qtPIWPa29NGLnuF7Q8zfr_dv0tjZE2rWnSVJ0qesmIXnd_FuqJflsXr-UbN2Cz4bqqJcRS9QcrXPDS6Z9z9b80PiOXl00hHBKJuWNh8SNvo5unBWc6ImH3Em51IlJstOd-HC-LQGNkWzolIPSkvP9ndIQJ-vYvxlcgH6UVvktLf4RreQgRQ==&c=st9EAnRjL1bQ_EJUavYxJvFThtuJ4H7OBumyqBn3dqzn4Q5XGu-YvQ==&ch=0wya8Ba-Y3Nd9bVXmtrZzAt-bjSmOmTT0IOOUrncud7-2c3-BkxRpw==)
I know I have been asking a lot of you this month but we are at war for the survival of common-sense.
Please, use this link to contribute if you can: [https://gaetzforcongress.revv.co/tucker-carlson](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Bk7qtPIWPa29NGLnuF7Q8zfr_dv0tjZE2rWnSVJ0qesmIXnd_FuqJflsXr-UbN2Cz4bqqJcRS9QcrXPDS6Z9z9b80PiOXl00hHBKJuWNh8SNvo5unBWc6ImH3Em51IlJstOd-HC-LQGNkWzolIPSkvP9ndIQJ-vYvxlcgH6UVvktLf4RreQgRQ==&c=st9EAnRjL1bQ_EJUavYxJvFThtuJ4H7OBumyqBn3dqzn4Q5XGu-YvQ==&ch=0wya8Ba-Y3Nd9bVXmtrZzAt-bjSmOmTT0IOOUrncud7-2c3-BkxRpw==)

[We have them red handed, I just need you to step up to keep fighting. ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Bk7qtPIWPa29NGLnuF7Q8zfr_dv0tjZE2rWnSVJ0qesmIXnd_FuqJflsXr-UbN2Cz4bqqJcRS9QcrXPDS6Z9z9b80PiOXl00hHBKJuWNh8SNvo5unBWc6ImH3Em51IlJstOd-HC-LQGNkWzolIPSkvP9ndIQJ-vYvxlcgH6UVvktLf4RreQgRQ==&c=st9EAnRjL1bQ_EJUavYxJvFThtuJ4H7OBumyqBn3dqzn4Q5XGu-YvQ==&ch=0wya8Ba-Y3Nd9bVXmtrZzAt-bjSmOmTT0IOOUrncud7-2c3-BkxRpw==)

People across Virginia and around the country have been stepping up to help Mark defend Virginia's Senate seat.

Mark's grassroots donors know that winning Virginia is key to beating Donald Trump in 2020, and that without Virginia, there's no path to taking back the Senate. The fact is, Mark won by less than 1% in 2014, and with GOP challengers now in the race against him, we need all the help we can get.

**Derek, our records indicate strong numbers from Manassas, but we don't have a record for you on file. Would you make your first donation today to help Mark keep Virginia blue in 2020?**

name: Tina Smith
subject: Let's talk about reproductive health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I've spent so much of my life fighting to make sure that all people have access to the basic health care that they need

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191024reprohc-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend,

I've spent so much of my life fighting to make sure that all people have access to the basic health care they need.

It's what fueled my passion for my work with Planned Parenthood, and it's a big part of what brought me to the Senate. Because I believe that people should have the freedom to live their lives as they want.

But when you don't have access to reproductive health care, it's not just your health that's impacted, your _economic freedom_ is also limited. And right now, these freedoms are under attack.

Trump and Mike Pence will stop at nothing to end reproductive health care as we know it. They believe that physicians shouldn't give people all of the health care information that they need, and I cannot sit by and watch it happen.

**Friend, when the government is looking over physicians' shoulders telling them what they can and cannot tell their patients, that's not freedom. That is wrong, and we need to fight with everything we have to stop Trump and the Republicans from taking away our freedoms.**

**[This is big for me. I have dedicated my life to this. And I need your help. That's why I have to ask: Will you chip in $10 or whatever you can right now so we can take on this fight?](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191024reprohc-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc41841/c1f7015/672484b9/11451249/2508843189/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnYzJ4MVp5QjlmUT09IjoidHNtLWVtYWlsLW9jdDIwMTkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImVtMTkxMDI0cmVwcm9oYy1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191024reprohc-full-exp&express_lane=true&amount=10")

Republican attacks on reproductive health care affect more than what we can or can't do with our bodies; it impacts the very foundation of our basic economic opportunity. It affects how we can strengthen the middle class, lift people out of poverty, and the ways we view our liberties in this country.

**[If we are going to lift up Minnesotans and all Americans with comprehensive, quality, affordable reproductive health care, we need to take a stand now. Will you join me in this fight and chip in $10 or whatever you can do today?](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191024reprohc-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Fighting with you,

Tina
**U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191024reprohc-full-biobox&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Watch: THANK YOU for rebuilding our country!
body:
President Donald J. Trump traveled to Pittsburgh yesterday, where he spoke to workers in America’s booming energy sector... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ab36e278ac&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • October 24, 2019
---
| | |
# **Watch: THANK YOU for rebuilding our country!**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3213df6847&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **President Donald J. Trump** traveled to Pittsburgh yesterday, where he spoke to workers in America’s booming energy sector at the Shale Insight Conference.

**The last time** President Trump spoke at the conference was on the campaign trail in 2016. Back then, American energy was under relentless assault—not from some foreign enemy, but from our own Federal Government. The previous Administration made it its mission to stifle growth with crippling regulations aimed at energy producers. These policies did nothing to advance “green energy,” but they did cost many workers their jobs.

**American energy dominance** is a powerful symbol of President Trump’s larger mission for our nation: “Instead of relying on foreign oil and foreign energy, we are now relying on American energy and American workers like never before,” he says.

**“I’m here** with the incredible people who fuel our factories, light up our homes, power our industries, and fill our hearts with true American pride,” he added. “With unmatched skill, grit, and devotion, you are making America the greatest energy superpower in the history of the world.”

**Energy superpower** is no exaggeration. Here are some of the facts and numbers behind America’s energy boom under the Trump Administration:
* The United States is now the world leader in oil _and_ natural gas production.

* Crude oil reached a record high in production last year—and is projected to set another record this year.

* Ditto for natural gas: Production is on pace to set a record high in 2019, the third straight year of such a record.

* In 2018, coal exports reached their highest level in 5 years.

**It wasn’t a mystery** figuring out how to get America back on top globally—it just took a President willing to abolish the counterproductive war on American energy workers. The Trump Administration ended job-killing policies put in place under President Obama, like the Clean Power Plan and “stream protection rule.” It pulled America out of the fraudulent, ineffective, and one-sided Paris Climate Accord. And it has opened up federally owned land and offshore areas for exploration and production.

**President Trump** also believes in building world-class infrastructure that puts more Americans back to work—no matter what the far left tries to block. His Administration has approved permits for the crucial Dakota Access and Keystone XL pipelines, for instance.

**Back in 2008,** Democrats actually offered a startling preview of what was to come. “If somebody wants to build a coal-fired power plant, they can. It’s just that it will bankrupt them,” then-Sen. Barack Obama explained. He was telling the truth: By the time President Trump took office, more than a _third_ of all coal mining jobs had vanished.

**The left is at it again,** but this time there’s even less pretending about their true motives. If implemented, the “Green New Deal” would be the most radical takeover of America’s economy ever contemplated. The ultimate goal is to eradicate all production of oil, coal, and natural gas in the United States—and millions of jobs along with it.

**President Trump** made clear yesterday that he will never let that happen. That’s because he knows who built this great country—and it wasn’t wanna-be socialists in Congress.

**“I will never stop fighting for you,** because I know that you are the ones who are rebuilding our nation. You are the ones who are restoring our strength. You are the ones renewing our spirit. And you are the ones who are making America greater than it has ever been before.”

[Thanks to President Trump, the war on American energy is over.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=84c8f5cb36&e=3ee4985eea)

**Read** : [The President’s full remarks to energy workers in Pennsylvania.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=576ab32efc&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|

The previous Administration made it its mission to stifle growth with crippling regulations aimed at energy producers. These policies did nothing to advance “green energy,” but they did cost many workers their jobs. American energy dominance is a powerful symbol of President Trump’s larger mission for our nation: “Instead of relying on foreign oil and foreign energy, we are now relying on American energy and American workers like never before,” he says. “I’m here with the incredible people who fuel our factories, light up our homes, power our industries, and fill our hearts with true American pride,” he added. “With unmatched skill, grit, and devotion, you are making America the greatest energy superpower in the history of the world.” Energy superpower is no exaggeration. Here are some of the facts and numbers behind America’s energy boom under the Trump Administration: The United States is now the world leader in oil and natural gas production. Crude oil reached a record high in production last year—and is projected to set another record this year. Ditto for natural gas: Production is on pace to set a record high in 2019, the third straight year of such a record. In 2018, coal exports reached their highest level in 5 years. It wasn’t a mystery figuring out how to get America back on top globally—it just took a President willing to abolish the counterproductive war on American energy workers. The Trump Administration ended job-killing policies put in place under President Obama, like the Clean Power Plan and “stream protection rule.” It pulled America out of the fraudulent, ineffective, and one-sided Paris Climate Accord. And it has opened up federally owned land and offshore areas for exploration and production. President Trump also believes in building world-class infrastructure that puts more Americans back to work—no matter what the far left tries to block. His Administration has approved permits for the crucial Dakota Access and Keystone XL pipelines, for instance. Back in 2008, Democrats actually offered a startling preview of what was to come. “If somebody wants to build a coal-fired power plant, they can. It’s just that it will bankrupt them,” then-Sen. Barack Obama explained. He was telling the truth: By the time President Trump took office, more than a third of all coal mining jobs had vanished. The left is at it again, but this time there’s even less pretending about their true motives. If implemented, the “Green New Deal” would be the most radical takeover of America’s economy ever contemplated. The ultimate goal is to eradicate all production of oil, coal, and natural gas in the United States—and millions of jobs along with it. President Trump made clear yesterday that he will never let that happen. That’s because he knows who built this great country—and it wasn’t wanna-be socialists in Congress. “I will never stop fighting for you, because I know that you are the ones who are rebuilding our nation. You are the ones who are restoring our strength. You are the ones renewing our spirit. And you are the ones who are making America greater than it has ever been before.” Read : | | Photo of the Day | Official White House Photo by Tia Dufour | Workers cheer asPresident Trump delivers remarkson American energyat the 9th Annual Shale Insight Conferencein Pittsburgh | October 23, 2019 | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: Senator Maggie Hassan
subject: Joyce Craig
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,
There is lots of talk about the presidential primary coming up, but in November of this year Manchester voters will go to the polls to vote for mayor.
Two years ago, my friend Joyce Craig was elected Mayor of Manchester after promising to help the Queen City reach its full potential. And in her first term, she's delivered.
Over the last two years, Joyce has demonstrated she is the leader Manchester needs. [**Will you please join me in supporting her campaign today?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc3c4/2a380d31/3d67cd15/f0ef6c/404579898/VEsH/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jcq4?refcode=hassanemail")
As mayor, Joyce has strengthened Manchester's public schools, including securing a $10.5 million federal grant for college and career training for students. Manchester is seeing unprecedented economic development, and the city has strengthened efforts to address the devastating opioid crisis.
[**The work Joyce is doing in Manchester impacts all of us across the state, and she needs our help. Election Day is less than two weeks away. Can Joyce count on you to make a $5, $10, or $25 contribution today to ensure she wins in November?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc3c4/2a380d31/3d67cd15/f0ef6c/404579898/VEsE/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jcq4?refcode=hassanemail")
Joyce's campaign is building the infrastructure and momentum necessary to make sure Democrats win up and down the ballot in 2020. Your contribution will help make that future success possible.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
[Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc3c4/2a380d31/3d67cd15/f0ef6c/404579898/VEsF/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jcq4?refcode=hassanemail")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc3c4/2a380d31/3d67cd15/f0ef6d/404579898/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
Senator Hassan is asking for contributions of up to $2,800 per election from individuals and $5,000 per election from multicandidate PACs. She is not asking for contributions in excess of the federal limits, or from corporations, labor organizations, and/or other federally prohibited sources.

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

name: Josh Mahony
subject: I will fight to protect reproductive rights
disclaimer_text: paid for by corporations, then contribute any amount to help Josh keep fighting
body:
There is a national effort to overturn Roe v. Wade, and I will do everything in my power to protect women's access to reproductive healthcare in Arkansas.

| [](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-october?refcode=em191024choice&recurring=auto&refcode2=header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
| Friend,

Earlier this month, the Supreme Court decided to take up an Alabama case that could set a precedent for overturning Roe v. Wade.

The Alabama law in question requires any physician performing an abortion in Alabama to have 'admitting privileges' at a nearby hospital -- which is historically hard for reproductive healthcare providers to get -- and it is similar to one that was struck down three years ago by the Supreme Court. **But now that the Court 's Justices have changed, Roe v. Wade is on the line.**

**[There's never been a more important time to elect a strong advocate for reproductive rights. As your Senator, I will fight for a woman's right to make her own healthcare decisions. Will you stand with me and pitch in $5 to help us win this race?](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-october?refcode=em191024choice&recurring=auto&refcode2=cta1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ [Express Donate $5](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-october?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em191024choice&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
[Express Donate $10](https://secure.joshuamahony.?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-october?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em191024choice&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
[Express Donate $25](https://secure.joshuamahony.?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-october?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em191024choice&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.joshuamahony.?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-october?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em191024choice&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
[Express Donate $100](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-october?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em191024choice&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
[Donate Other Amount](https://secure.joshuamahony.?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-october?refcode=em191024choice&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=") The government -- state or federal -- should never come between a woman and her healthcare provider. And as your Senator, I will ensure that women have full control of their own healthcare decisions.

We all need to be in this fight.

**[I need you to step up today and chip in $5 or whatever you can so we can fight for reproductive rights in the Senate.](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-october?refcode=em191024choice&recurring=auto&refcode2=cta1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Let's do this together,

Josh Mahony

If you want a senator who speaks for you and isn't bought and paid for by corporations, then contribute any amount to help Josh keep fighting. [CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-october?refcode=em191024choice&recurring=auto&refcode2=biobox&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

With the future of Roe v. Wade in danger, it's never been more important for Congress to act to protect women's health - so we're counting on you to speak out right now.

[_**Add your name, and tell Congress to protect reproductive rights!**_](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df49/693b8b0a/442bb305/72de6276/264572007/VEsE/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/protect-reproductive-rights/?code=markey&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fmarkey-october2019-weekly%3Frefcode%3D102419_ja%26amount%3D27%26recurring%3Dtrue")

Reproductive freedom is non-negotiable.

While the Trump administration and the right-wing Republicans in Congress do everything they can to undermine reproductive freedom, we're not agonizing-we're organizing to stop them at every turn.

[_**Will you stand with us and add your name to tell Congress to act now to protect reproductive rights?**_](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df49/693b8b0a/442bb305/72de6276/264572007/VEsF/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/protect-reproductive-rights/?code=markey&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fmarkey-october2019-weekly%3Frefcode%3D102419_ja%26amount%3D27%26recurring%3Dtrue")

name: Jess B., National Finance Director
subject: bumping
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team, I'm bumping Michael's email from earlier.

We're falling short of our fundraising goal this month, and it's absolutely crucial that we make up the ground needed to reach it.

Why? Nine out of ten Democratic voters haven't made up their mind on who they're going to vote for, and our campaign is gaining traction. This race is wide open!!

Michael doesn't have billions of dollars to buy his way into this.

[We have something better - the support of grassroots activists like you.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae93/134673f2/a2b0c93/6997fd84/2321790220/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-oct-goal?refcode=EM_FR_B2_102419_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

With your support, we can keep building this campaign all the way to November 2020.

[Our average online donation is $29, but any amount you give gets us closer to reaching our goal. Will you chip in today, friend? >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae93/134673f2/a2b0c93/6997fd9b/2321790220/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-oct-goal?refcode=EM_FR_B2_102419_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| | [CHIP IN $5 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae93/134673f2/a2b0c93/6997fd9a/2321790220/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-oct-goal?refcode=EM_FR_B2_102419_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

---
| [CHIP IN $29 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae93/134673f2/a2b0c93/6997fd99/2321790220/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-oct-goal?refcode=EM_FR_B2_102419_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=29&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| [CHIP IN $50 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae93/134673f2/a2b0c93/6997fd98/2321790220/VEsA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-oct-goal?refcode=EM_FR_B2_102419_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| [CHIP IN $100 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae93/134673f2/a2b0c93/6997fd9f/2321790220/VEsB/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-oct-goal?refcode=EM_FR_B2_102419_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---

* * *
_Begin Forwarded Message:_

Friend: In a moment, [I'm going to ask you to make a $29 donation to my campaign, but first let me tell you why.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae93/134673f2/a2b0c93/6997fd9b/2321790220/VEsO/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-oct-goal?refcode=EM_FR_B2_102419_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

I crunched the numbers with my finance team, and we're short of our goal this month.

[We've launched ads, opened new offices, and hired field staff, but we need to raise another $175,000 before Halloween if we're going to keep building at the pace we need to win!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae93/134673f2/a2b0c93/6997fd84/2321790220/VEsP/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-oct-goal?refcode=EM_FR_B2_102419_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

While other candidates are starting to burn out after months or even years in the spotlight, I'm just getting started.

Since I refuse to take contributions from corporate special interests, every step I take in this journey is because grassroots supporters like you are with me, ensuring our campaign has what it takes to win this hard-fought race.

[The average online donation to my campaign is $29, but any amount you donate today will help us reach this crucial goal. Team, I'm asking, will you chip in today? >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae93/134673f2/a2b0c93/6997fd9b/2321790220/VEsHBQ/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-oct-goal?refcode=EM_FR_B2_102419_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| | [CHIP IN $5 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae93/134673f2/a2b0c93/6997fd9a/2321790220/VEsHBA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-oct-goal?refcode=EM_FR_B2_102419_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| [CHIP IN $10 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae93/134673f2/a2b0c93/6997fd84/2321790220/VEsHBw/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-oct-goal?refcode=EM_FR_B2_102419_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| [CHIP IN $29 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae93/134673f2/a2b0c93/6997fd99/2321790220/VEsHBg/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-oct-goal?refcode=EM_FR_B2_102419_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=29&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| [CHIP IN $50 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae93/134673f2/a2b0c93/6997fd98/2321790220/VEsHAQ/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-oct-goal?refcode=EM_FR_B2_102419_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| [CHIP IN $100 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae93/134673f2/a2b0c93/6997fd9f/2321790220/VEsHAA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-oct-goal?refcode=EM_FR_B2_102419_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
I know this is a big goal to hit.

But if we reach it, we keep funding TV ads, hiring new organizers, and building our movement to reach out to the 90% of Democrats who haven't made up their mind yet about who they are supporting in this primary.

[We will win this election the same way we always have: by presenting a compelling and unifying vision for our country.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae93/134673f2/a2b0c93/6997fd84/2321790220/VEsHAw/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-oct-goal?refcode=EM_FR_B2_102419_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[**I 'm counting on this team to step up and help us hit our goal by Halloween. I know we can do it. Can you chip in $29 (or whatever you can) right now?**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae93/134673f2/a2b0c93/6997fd99/2321790220/VEsHAg/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-oct-goal?refcode=EM_FR_B2_102419_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=29&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---

Thank you,

Michael
